items_flat.title_en: xAI launches Grok 4.5, optimized for coding and agentic work
items_flat.title_zh: xAI 推出 Grok 4.5，優化編碼與代理式工作
items_flat.summary_en: xAI introduced Grok 4.5 as its smartest model to date, built on a massive new V9 foundation model plus Cursor coding data. It targets real-world software engineering, agentic workflows and knowledge work, delivering Opus-class performance.
items_flat.summary_zh: xAI 推出目前最強模型 Grok 4.5，基於全新大型 V9 基礎模型並使用 Cursor 編碼數據訓練。專注真實軟體工程、代理工作流與知識工作，提供 Opus 等級效能。
items_flat.analysis_en: The explicit focus on Cursor co-training and practical efficiency metrics positions xAI as a strong contender in the coding-agent niche where speed, cost and real-world engineering matter most. Rollout continues without new updates today.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 明確聚焦 Cursor 共同訓練與實用效能指標，讓 xAI 在編碼代理領域成為強勁競爭者，此領域速度、成本與真實工程能力至關重要。今日無新更新，持續 rollout。
items_flat.quote: It is an Opus-class model, but faster, more token-efficient and lower cost.
items_flat.quote_zh: 這是Opus級模型，但更快、更省token且成本更低。

links.label: xAI Official / Elon Musk on X

items_flat.title_en: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs outline joint bioresilience approach
items_flat.title_zh: Google DeepMind 與 Isomorphic Labs 概述聯合生物韌性方法
items_flat.summary_en: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs published their joint approach to bioresilience, detailing how frontier AI models will support prevention, detection and response to biological threats. The plan covers over 15 partnerships and concrete tooling.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 與 Isomorphic Labs 發布聯合生物韌性方法，詳述前沿 AI 模型如何支援生物威脅的預防、偵測與應對。計畫涵蓋 15 個以上夥伴關係與具體工具。
items_flat.analysis_en: The post formalizes a dual-use posture that treats AI both as a potential risk amplifier and as essential infrastructure for biosecurity. Concrete tooling advances responsible development but leaves open questions on implementation scale.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 正式化雙重用途立場，將 AI 視為潛在風險放大器與生物安全關鍵基礎設施。具體工具推進負責任開發，但實施規模仍存不確定性。
items_flat.quote: We are committed to working openly and collaboratively — with biosecurity labs, governments and the broader scientific community — to ensure AI is developed and deployed responsibly to help protect against one of society’s greatest risks.
items_flat.quote_zh: 我們承諾與生物安全實驗室、政府及更廣泛的科學社群公開合作，確保 AI 以負責任的方式開發與部署，幫助防範社會最大風險之一。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI advances automated red-teaming for GPT-5.6 Sol development
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 推進 GPT-5.6 Sol 開發的自動化紅隊測試
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI detailed its use of extensive automated red-teaming, including over 700,000 A100e GPU hours dedicated to discovering universal jailbreaks, as part of preparing GPT-5.6 Sol. This self-play and continuous adversarial testing approach was highlighted.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 詳細說明使用大規模自動化紅隊測試，包括超過 70 萬 A100e GPU 小時用於發現通用越獄，作為準備 GPT-5.6 Sol 的一部分。此自我對抗與持續測試方法受到強調。
items_flat.analysis_en: Automated red-teaming at this scale creates a genuine safety flywheel and improves robustness, but heavy reliance on internal automated systems limits external verification. The development underscores ongoing safety investment amid rapid capability gains.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 此規模自動紅隊測試建立真正安全飛輪並提升穩健性，但高度依賴內部系統限制外部驗證。凸顯在能力快速提升中持續的安全投資。
items_flat.quote: We’ve also dedicated over 700,000 A100e GPU hours to automatically find universal jailbreaks, and we will run automated red teaming continuously during deployment.
items_flat.quote_zh: 我們也投入超過 70 萬 A100e GPU 小時自動尋找通用越獄，並將在部署期間持續執行自動紅隊測試。

links.label: OpenAI Deployment Safety Hub - GPT-5.6 System Card

items_flat.title_en: Meta begins alerting parents when teens discuss self-harm with Meta AI
items_flat.title_zh: Meta 開始在青少年與 Meta AI 討論自傷時通知家長
items_flat.summary_en: Meta announced that parents using Instagram supervision tools will now receive alerts if their teen discusses suicide or self-harm with Meta AI. Flagged conversations undergo manual review; the feature is live in select countries.
items_flat.summary_zh: Meta 宣布，使用 Instagram 監督工具的家長現在會在青少年與 Meta AI 討論自殺或自傷時收到警報。標記對話會進行人工審核；功能已在部分國家上線。
items_flat.analysis_en: The move sets a concrete industry precedent for AI companion safety by involving human review and parental notification. Success will depend on false-positive rates, review quality, and broader adoption across platforms.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 透過人工審核與家長通知，為 AI 伴侶安全設定具體產業先例。成功取決於誤報率、審核品質與跨平台採用程度。
items_flat.quote: Parents using Instagram supervision tools will now be notified if their teen discusses suicide or self-harm with Meta AI.
items_flat.quote_zh: 使用 Instagram 監護工具的家長，若青少年與 Meta AI 討論自殺或自傷，現將收到通知。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI raises ChatGPT custom instructions limit to 5,000 characters
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT 自訂指令限制提高至 5,000 字元
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI increased the character limit for custom instructions in ChatGPT from 1,500 to 5,000 for Plus, Pro, Enterprise, Business and Education users. This allows more detailed and persistent user personas and context.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT 自訂指令字元限制從 1,500 提高至 5,000，適用於 Plus、Pro、Enterprise、Business 與 Education 用戶。允許更詳細且持久的使用者角色與上下文。
items_flat.analysis_en: A quiet but practical quality-of-life upgrade that reduces friction for power users. It also quietly widens the capability gap between paid and free tiers.
items_flat.analysis_zh: 安靜但實用的生活品質升級，減少強力用戶摩擦。同時悄然擴大付費與免費用戶的能力差距。
items_flat.quote: Plus, Pro, Enterprise, Business, and Education users can now save up to 5,000 characters.
items_flat.quote_zh: Plus、Pro、Enterprise、Business 與 Education 用戶現可儲存最多 5,000 字元。

links.label: OpenAI Help Center / ChatGPT Release Notes

links.label: xAI Official / Elon Musk on X

brief_en: Quiet day across frontier labs on July 17. xAI's Grok 4.5 (launched yesterday) continues rollout emphasis on coding/agentic tasks; Google DeepMind/Isomorphic bioresilience framework; OpenAI red-teaming for GPT-5.6 Sol and custom instructions upgrade; Meta parental alerts feature live. No major new model releases or announcements in the past 12 hours.
brief_zh: 2026-07-17 前沿 AI 大廠動態平靜。xAI Grok 4.5（昨日推出）持續強調編碼與代理任務；Google DeepMind 與 Isomorphic 生物韌性框架；OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol 自動紅隊測試及自訂指令升級；Meta 家長警報功能上線。過去 12 小時無重大新模型發布。
